_provenance: schema-derived from R1 AC-10 race condition requirement. Describes concurrent engine save_state + dashboard dismiss isolation invariants. No producer-computed values.
description: Race isolation invariants: dismiss POST must NEVER touch bot_state; engine bot_state writes must be unaffected by concurrent dismisses

dismiss_never_touches_bot_state.description: POST /api/fleet-alert/dismiss must ONLY write to fleet_alert_state. It must never call database.load_state() or database.save_state().
dismiss_never_touches_bot_state.test_approach: Patch database.load_state and database.save_state; assert they are NOT called during dismiss POST

engine_bot_state_unaffected.description: Engine's bot_state writes (save_state) proceed independently. A concurrent dismiss must not corrupt or revert engine-written bot_state values.
engine_bot_state_unaffected.test_approach: Write a known bot_state, then simulate dismiss POST, then verify bot_state unchanged
